name: Internsheep
overview: Shuvro, a fresh graduate, joins AgenZ, as an intern, deeming it as the last phase of his race to success. Little does he know, his journey will be full of chaos, surrounded by a myriad of characters who never fail to make every day an adventure. The craziness that lies within the not-so-black-and-white world of a marketing agency, makes him question his life, his relationships, and his existence.

trailers.title: Internsheep | Official Trailer | Chorki Original Series | Shommo | Sadia | Nodi | Arpan | Mishu
